title: Wxjxpp的博客
subTitle: 欢迎光临我的小窝
indexStyle:
<style>
#hitokoto-container {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle, #f6f8fa);
  border-left: 3px solid #0969da;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted, #57606a);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

#hitokoto-text {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  font-style: italic;
}

#hitokoto-from {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-fg-subtle, #6e7781);
}

#hitokoto-refresh {
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #0969da;
  font-size: 12px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  user-select: none;
}

#hitokoto-refresh:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>
